title: Cherry Villages! (Mot's Structures)
description: This mod/datapack adds not-so-complex - vanilla like structures into the game using only vanilla blocks that already are in the game.
body:
This datapack adds not-so-complex - vanilla like structures that aim to look like they fit in with the rest of the world and feel like they belong there. 

Currently, to find maps, you need to get to an air baloon and loot the chest in it. The map in the chest depends on what type of air baloon you find.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59aa65b76b93733ba60b0267aef5c49b90b7ca2a.png)

The custom recource pack is on the works.

This mod/datapack is in a very early stage of development. Expect things to change.
